source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
In the transistor amplifier circuit shown in <image>, the transistor has the following parameters: \( \beta_{DC} = 60 \), \( V_{BE} = 0.7V \), \( h_{ie} \rightarrow \infty \), \( h_{fe} \rightarrow \infty \). The capacitance \( C_c \) can be assumed to be infinite.

If \( \beta_{DC} \) is increased by 10%, the collector-to-emitter voltage drop

verifiability: answer_type is short_text and matches one of the provided multiple-choice options
the target answer is categorical and specific: 'decreases by less than or equal to 10%'
